scope: main...HEAD plus uncommitted skill validation updates (PR #110 / merge/upstream-2026-05-04)

Docker image build: tokenkey-local:merge-upstream-2026-05-04 built successfully

resolved_findings.description: Responses-to-ChatCompletions streaming treated upstream data: [DONE] without a Responses terminal event as an error, which could mark otherwise complete compatible streams as failed.
resolved_findings.resolution: Changed [DONE] handling to finalize the downstream stream normally and added TestForwardAsChatCompletions_DoneSentinelWithoutTerminalFinalizesStream.

resolved_findings.description: Raw chat-completions SSE framing needed a regression guard to ensure blank-line event separators remain preserved for strict SSE clients.
resolved_findings.resolution: Added TestForwardAsRawChatCompletions_PreservesSSEBlankLineFraming to lock the current byte-framing behavior.

resolved_findings.description: Stage0 local deploy skill did not require structure-level verification for gateway responses and could let agents stop at marker text.
resolved_findings.resolution: Added structured validation requirements for models, chat, messages, responses, multi-key/group evidence, and local Caddy identity fallback.

resolved_findings.description: Prod release deploy skill did not explicitly require structure-level smoke verification or an additional /v1/responses check when relevant.
resolved_findings.resolution: Added production structured smoke requirements and mandatory /v1/responses supplemental check for Responses/OpenAI-compat/Engine/Evidence releases.
